da.hero_subtitle: Byg din egen pakke — vælg 1, 2 eller 3 kurser. Næste runde: April 2026.
da.builder_section_lead: Bundles er for dig der vil have maksimal progression — uden at stresse kroppen. Vælg 1, 2 eller 3 kurser. Ved 2 kurser: 10% rabat. Ved All-in: 15% rabat + gratis 1-måneds pass (værdi 1.399 kr.).
da.builder_foot: Du kan også vælge kun ét kursus — så sender vi dig videre til tilmelding.
da.acco_mini_text: Studio apartments (private) og private værelser i 2-værelses lejlighed — ideelt for internationale eller andre byer.
da.how_lead: Du får en tydelig ramme uden at skulle læse alt på hver kursusside. Formatet er enkelt — og bygget til at skabe resultater uge for uge.
da.how_item4_hint: så du kan tage 1, 2 eller all-in
da.how_fine: Tip: Kombinér 2 kurser for 10% rabat — eller gå All-in for 15% rabat + 1-måneders pass.
da.courses_lead: Hvert kursus fokuserer på én retning. Sammen dækker de alt, hvad kroppen har brug for.
da.course_inv_desc: Hovedstand, underarmsstand, håndstand — fra fundament til kreative flows. Styrke, teknik og mod.
da.course_splits_desc: Forlæns og midtersplits. Fleksibilitet, styrke og kontrol. Hot og non-heated sessions.
da.course_back_desc: Cobra, Camel, Wheel og avancerede variationer. Sikker progression med fokus på styrke.
da.why_lead: Når du kombinerer kurserne, træner du de samme bottlenecks fra flere vinkler. Det reducerer kompensation (lænd, nakke, baglår) — og gør din udvikling hurtigere og mere sikker.
da.why_back_sub: Åbning + styrke — uden at "dumpe" i lænden
da.why_bridge_text: Skuldre + rygsøjle + hofter er de tre store "flaskehalse". Når du træner dem på tværs af kurserne, bliver kroppen mere symmetrisk stærk — og du kan udvikle dig uden at kompensere med lænd, nakke eller baglår.
da.pricing_title: Jo mere du vælger — jo mere sparer du
da.pricing_lead: Du kan tage 1, 2 eller 3 kurser. Bundles gør det realistisk at bygge en stærk praksis over 4 uger — og for mange føles det som en lille, progressiv "wellness retreat" i København.
da.pricing1_sub: Perfekt hvis du vil fokusere skarpt
da.pricing3_bonus_note:
Hot Yoga: yoga med varme (ca. 38°C). Vibro Yoga: yoga med vibration (nyt).
Passet kan starte når som helst og tæller fra din første booking (1 måned frem).
da.pricing3_total: Total værdi: 2.434 kr. i besparelse og bonus
da.pricing_fine: * Alle kurser er 4 uger med 8 × 90 min. Bundle-rabatten gælder for samlet køb.
da.unlimited_title: 1 måned unlimited — gør din progression hurtigere
da.unlimited_lead: Bonus-måneden er ikke "flere timer". Den er en komplet træningsmåned, der støtter dine workshops: du varmer op, restituerer og integrerer teknikken — så kroppen lærer hurtigere og mere stabilt.
da.unlimited_card1_sub: Brug varmen strategisk før/efter workshops (fx Gentle Hot Yoga og Bikram Yoga Variation)
unlimited_card1_items: Varm væv op og få bedre bevægelighed uden at presse.
Forbered skuldre/hofter til inversions, backbends og splits.
Gentag linjer (core, scapula, bækken) i et sikkert setup.
da.unlimited_card2_sub: Restitution er der, hvor kroppen "låser" fremskridt fast
unlimited_card2_items: Downshift nervesystemet → mindre spænding og bedre kontrol.
Plads i kroppen så styrke og teknik kan sætte sig.
da.unlimited_card2_link: Se Yin hos Hot Yoga Copenhagen
da.unlimited_card3_sub: Her bliver teknikken til "din nye normal"
unlimited_card3_items: Integrér cues fra workshops i bevægelse og transitions.
Byg styrke i de ranges du åbner (aktiv fleksibilitet).
Gentag små elementer ofte → målbart bedre progress.
da.unlimited_card3_note: Tænk: 2 workshops/uge + 2–4 klasser der støtter kroppen = en helhedsplan.
da.unlimited_aside_title: Det føles som et retreat — midt i København
da.unlimited_aside_text: Når du tager 3-kursus bundlen, får du ikke kun rabat — du får også et system, der gør det realistisk at udvikle dig hurtigt: prep (varme), recovery (yin) og integration (flow).
da.unlimited_aside_prep: Prep: Gentle Hot Yoga + Bikram Yoga Variation gør kroppen klar.
da.unlimited_aside_recovery: Recovery: Yin giver ro og restitution mellem workshops.
da.unlimited_aside_integration: Integration: Vinyasa (Flow) bygger teknikken ind i kroppen.
da.unlimited_aside_fine: Måneden kan starte når som helst og tæller fra din første booking og én måned frem.
da.inspire_eyebrow: DIN KROP KAN MERE, END DU TROR
da.inspire_title: Inversions, splits og backbends ser umulige ud — indtil de bliver dine.
da.inspire_lead: Vi ser dem overalt: den smukke inversion, den dybe backbend, den rene split. Det kan ligne noget "kun for de få". Men sandheden er enklere: det er færdigheder — og færdigheder kan læres.
da.inspire_item1_text: Strukturerede forløb med teknik, progression og tydelige rammer — så du bygger styrke og mobilitet uden at presse kroppen for hårdt.
da.inspire_item2_text: Du møder erfarne undervisere i studiet — du kan spørge, få feedback og mærke din udvikling fra uge til uge.
da.inspire_item3_text: Vi holder prisen fair og formatet ærligt — fordi flere skal kunne være med. Her handler det om praksis, ikke buzzwords.
da.inspire_item4_text: Mange bruger et bundle som et progressivt retreat i København: træning, god søvn, sauna/koldt bad — og en krop der føles lettere.
da.inspire_fine: Du behøver ikke være "klar" for at starte — du bliver klar af at starte.
da.accom_lead: Vi tilbyder overnatningsmuligheder specifikt til kursus- og bundle-kursister, der kommer fra andre byer eller udlandet. Fair priser, enkel logistik og tæt på studiet — så du kan fokusere på praksis og progression.
da.accom_single_fine: Inkl. forbrug · Perfekt hvis du ønsker ro, privatliv og et trygt sted at lade op mellem workshops.
da.accom_double_tag: Delt lejlighed · Dit eget private soveværelse
da.accom_double_fine: En stærk løsning, hvis du ønsker fair pris og en enkel, rolig base tæt på studiet.
da.accom_fine: Tip: Er du i tvivl om datoer? Skriv til os — så hjælper vi dig med den bedste løsning.
da.faq_lead: Alt du skal vide om kurser, bundles og tilmelding.
da.faq_a1: Hvert kursus er 4 uger med 8 × 90-minutters workshops. Du får to workshops om ugen med fokus på teknik, progression og sikkerhed. Formatet er en blanding af hot og non-heated sessions.
da.faq_q2: Kan jeg tage bare ét kursus?
da.faq_a2: Ja! Du kan sagtens vælge ét kursus og fokusere skarpt. Bundlerabatten gælder kun ved 2 eller 3 kurser — men et enkelt kursus giver stadig fuld adgang til alle 8 workshops.
da.faq_a3: Afbestil senest 2 timer før klassens start for at undgå at miste dit klip eller blive opkrævet. Du kan nemt afmelde via appen eller på hjemmesiden.
da.faq_a4: Medbring behageligt træningstøj, et håndklæde og en vandflaske. Vi har måtter, håndklæder og udstyr til udlejning, hvis du har brug for det. Tip: Kom gerne 10–15 minutter før din første klasse, så vi kan vise dig rundt.
da.faq_q5: Hvornår får jeg adgang efter tilmelding?
da.faq_a5: Din adgang aktiveres med det samme efter betaling. Du har adgang til alle workshops i hele din kursusperiode.
da.faq_a6: Passet giver dig unlimited adgang til alle klasser hos Hot Yoga Copenhagen og Vibro Yoga — Vinyasa (Flow), Bikram Yoga Variation, Yin Yoga, Gentle Hot Yoga og mere. Det kan starte når som helst og tæller fra din første booking og én måned frem.
da.faq_contact_text: Finder du ikke svar? Skriv til
da.cta_title: Din krop kan mere, end du tror
da.cta_text: Vælg dine kurser, byg din pakke og kom i gang. Du behøver ikke være klar — du bliver klar af at starte.

en.hero_subtitle: Build your own package — choose 1, 2 or 3 courses. Next round: April 2026.
en.builder_section_lead: Bundles are for those who want maximum progression — without stressing the body. Choose 1, 2 or 3 courses. With 2 courses: 10% off. With All-in: 15% off + free 1-month pass (value 1,399 DKK).
en.builder_foot: You can also choose just one course — we'll redirect you to sign-up.
en.acco_mini_text: Studio apartments (private) and private rooms in 2-bedroom apartments — ideal for internationals or those from other cities.
en.acco_mini_item2: Perfect for a retreat-like feel in the city
en.how_lead: You get a clear framework without having to read everything on each course page. The format is simple — and built to deliver results week by week.
en.how_item3_hint: so you can feel the development
en.how_item4_hint: so you can take 1, 2 or all-in
en.how_fine: Tip: Combine 2 courses for 10% off — or go All-in for 15% off + 1-month pass.
en.courses_lead: Each course focuses on one direction. Together, they cover everything the body needs.
en.course_inv_desc: Headstand, forearm stand, handstand — from foundation to creative flows. Strength, technique and courage.
en.course_splits_desc: Front splits and middle splits. Flexibility, strength and control. Hot and non-heated sessions.
en.course_back_desc: Cobra, Camel, Wheel and advanced variations. Safe progression with a focus on strength.
en.why_title: Smart progression — not just a discount
en.why_lead: When you combine courses, you train the same bottlenecks from multiple angles. This reduces compensation (lower back, neck, hamstrings) — and makes your progress faster and safer.
en.why_back_sub: Opening + strength — without "dumping" in the lower back
en.why_bridge_text: Shoulders + spine + hips are the three major "bottlenecks". When you train them across courses, the body becomes more symmetrically strong — and you can develop without compensating with lower back, neck or hamstrings.
en.pricing_title: The more you choose — the more you save
en.pricing_lead: You can take 1, 2 or 3 courses. Bundles make it realistic to build a strong practice over 4 weeks — and for many it feels like a small, progressive "wellness retreat" in Copenhagen.
en.pricing1_sub: Perfect if you want sharp focus
en.pricing3_bonus_note:
Hot Yoga: yoga with heat (approx. 38°C). Vibro Yoga: yoga with vibration (new).
The pass can start anytime and counts from your first booking (1 month forward).
en.pricing3_total: Total value: 2,434 DKK in savings and bonus
en.pricing_fine: * All courses are 4 weeks with 8 × 90 min. The bundle discount applies to combined purchase.
en.unlimited_lead: The bonus month isn't "more hours". It's a complete training month that supports your workshops: you warm up, recover and integrate technique — so the body learns faster and more steadily.
en.unlimited_card1_sub: Use the heat strategically before/after workshops (e.g. Gentle Hot Yoga and Bikram Yoga Variation)
unlimited_card1_items: Warm up tissue and gain better mobility without pushing.
Prepare shoulders/hips for inversions, backbends and splits.
Repeat patterns (core, scapula, pelvis) in a safe setup.
en.unlimited_card2_sub: Recovery is where the body "locks in" progress
unlimited_card2_items: Downshift the nervous system → less tension and better control.
Space in the body so strength and technique can settle.
en.unlimited_card2_link: See Yin at Hot Yoga Copenhagen
en.unlimited_card3_sub: This is where technique becomes your "new normal"
unlimited_card3_items: Integrate cues from workshops into movement and transitions.
Build strength in the ranges you open (active flexibility).
Repeat small elements often → measurably better progress.
en.unlimited_card3_note: Think: 2 workshops/week + 2–4 classes that support the body = a complete plan.
en.unlimited_aside_title: It feels like a retreat — in the heart of Copenhagen
en.unlimited_aside_text: When you take the 3-course bundle, you don't just get a discount — you also get a system that makes it realistic to develop quickly: prep (heat), recovery (yin) and integration (flow).
en.unlimited_aside_prep: Prep: Gentle Hot Yoga + Bikram Yoga Variation prepares the body.
en.unlimited_aside_recovery: Recovery: Yin provides calm and recovery between workshops.
en.unlimited_aside_integration: Integration: Vinyasa (Flow) builds technique into the body.
en.unlimited_aside_fine: The month can start anytime and counts from your first booking and one month forward.
en.inspire_eyebrow: YOUR BODY CAN DO MORE THAN YOU THINK
en.inspire_title: Inversions, splits and backbends look impossible — until they become yours.
en.inspire_lead: We see them everywhere: the beautiful inversion, the deep backbend, the clean split. It may look like something "only for the few". But the truth is simpler: they are skills — and skills can be learned.
en.inspire_item1_text: Structured programmes with technique, progression and clear frameworks — so you build strength and mobility without pushing the body too hard.
en.inspire_item2_text: You meet experienced teachers in the studio — you can ask, get feedback and feel your development from week to week.
en.inspire_item3_text: We keep the price fair and the format honest — because more people should be able to join. Here it's about practice, not buzzwords.
en.inspire_item4_text: Many use a bundle as a progressive retreat in Copenhagen: training, good sleep, sauna/cold bath — and a body that feels lighter.
en.inspire_fine: You don't need to be "ready" to start — you become ready by starting.
en.accom_lead: We offer accommodation specifically for course and bundle students coming from other cities or abroad. Fair prices, simple logistics and close to the studio — so you can focus on practice and progression.
en.accom_single_fine: Incl. utilities · Perfect if you want peace, privacy and a safe place to recharge between workshops.
en.accom_double_tag: Shared apartment · Your own private bedroom
en.accom_double_note: per person · for the entire stay
en.accom_double_fine: A strong solution if you want a fair price and a simple, quiet base close to the studio.
en.accom_fine: Tip: Not sure about dates? Write to us — we'll help you find the best solution.
en.faq_lead: Everything you need to know about courses, bundles and sign-up.
en.faq_a1: Each course is 4 weeks with 8 × 90-minute workshops. You get two workshops per week with a focus on technique, progression and safety. The format is a mix of hot and non-heated sessions.
en.faq_q2: Can I take just one course?
en.faq_a2: Yes! You can absolutely choose one course and focus sharply. The bundle discount only applies with 2 or 3 courses — but a single course still gives you full access to all 8 workshops.
en.faq_a3: Cancel at least 2 hours before the class start to avoid losing your spot or being charged. You can easily cancel via the app or website.
en.faq_a4: Bring comfortable workout clothes, a towel and a water bottle. We have mats, towels and equipment for rent if you need it. Tip: Please arrive 10–15 minutes before your first class so we can show you around.
en.faq_q5: When do I get access after signing up?
en.faq_a5: Your access is activated immediately after payment. You have access to all workshops throughout your course period.
en.faq_q6: What about the 1-month pass in All-in?
en.faq_a6: The pass gives you unlimited access to all classes at Hot Yoga Copenhagen and Vibro Yoga — Vinyasa (Flow), Bikram Yoga Variation, Yin Yoga, Gentle Hot Yoga and more. It can start anytime and counts from your first booking and one month forward.
en.faq_contact_text: Can't find an answer? Write to
en.cta_title: Your body can do more than you think
en.cta_text: Choose your courses, build your package and get started. You don't need to be ready — you become ready by starting.
